prestazioni: F20C1 (AP2-spec 2.2L) stroker kit with 89mm forged crankshaft (Toda Racing), 87mm forged pistons (JE 2618 alloy), and billet connecting rods (BC Rods) to achieve 2.3L displacement with 12.5:1 compression ratio, paired with Toda Racing Type-R cams (272° duration, 11.5mm lift) and upgraded valve springs (Toda Racing) for 9,500 RPM redline capability

Full titanium valvetrain conversion including Toda Racing titanium retainers, titanium valves (Ferrea 6000 series), and titanium valve spring seats, combined with a Toda Racing billet cam gear set for precise timing adjustment under high-RPM stress

Custom forced-induction setup utilizing a Garrett GTX3582R turbocharger (0.82 A/R turbine housing) with a custom 3-inch stainless steel exhaust manifold (HyTech Exhaust), paired with a PWR 4-core intercooler, HKS SSQV4 blow-off valve, and a custom 3-inch downpipe with a GReddy Revolution RS 3.5-inch cat-back exhaust system, tuned via Hondata KPro V4 with a custom 450whp map on E85 fuel
estetica: Seibon Carbon AP2 Club Racer-specific hardtop with integrated ducktail spoiler, finished in matte carbon fiber with a clear-coated weave pattern for UV protection and weight reduction (saves ~12 lbs over OEM hardtop)

Voltex Type-5R widebody conversion kit (AP2-specific) with custom carbon fiber overfenders, front bumper canards (Rocket Bunny), and a custom rear diffuser (Varis) featuring integrated dual-exit exhaust cutouts, all painted in Honda Championship White (NH-574M) with gloss black accents

OEM+ interior refresh with Bride Zeta III AP2-specific seats (red Alcantara with black leather bolsters), custom roll cage (Sparco Pro 2000 8-point bolt-in) wrapped in red Alcantara, and a MOMO Mod.78 steering wheel (350mm diameter) with a custom quick-release hub (NRG Innovations), paired with a custom digital dash (AEM CD-7) replacing the OEM cluster
